outputSchema.description: JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) constraining the LLM's output. The host's structured-output mechanism translates this to the provider-specific format (Anthropic tool use, OpenAI JSON mode, Gemini response_schema). The runtime parses the model's response, validates against this schema, and rejects with `structured_output_invalid` if validation fails after the configured retry budget.

retryOnInvalidJson.description: How many times to retry when the model returns content that doesn't validate against outputSchema. 0 = no retry; first invalid response surfaces as `structured_output_invalid`.
